en: Birds fly south in winter.
She reads the news every morning.
The sky looks beautiful today.
He works at a hospital.
She is cooking dinner right now.
They are studying for the exam.
We finished the project last night.
He will join us tomorrow.
She is going to visit her grandma.
I have just finished my homework.
She can play the violin.
You should eat more vegetables.
Students must wear uniforms.
It might snow tomorrow.
Do you like spicy food?
Where does she live?

zh: 我学校附近有一个公园。
en: There is a park near my school.
His bag is heavier than mine.
She is the tallest in her class.

zh: 这条路和那条路一样长。
en: This road is as long as that one.

zh: 他每天跑步是为了保持健康。
en: He runs every day to stay fit.

zh: 她早来是为了占个座位。
en: She came early in order to get a seat.
The music was so loud that I couldn't sleep.

zh: 他太紧张了，说不出话来。
en: He is too nervous to speak.
The letter was written by her father.
The game was won by our team.

zh: 如果你现在出发，你能赶上火车。
en: If you leave now, you will catch the train.

zh: 如果我更高，我会当模特。
en: If I were taller, I would be a model.
When the bell rings, class begins.
She was sleeping while he was cooking.
She checked her bag before she left home.
He felt much better after he rested.
I believe that honesty is important.

zh: 没有人知道接下来会发生什么。
en: Nobody knows what will happen next.

zh: 给你打电话的那个人是我叔叔。
en: The man who called you is my uncle.

zh: 我们看的那部电影非常精彩。
en: The film which we watched was excellent.

zh: 她因为感到不舒服所以待在家里。
en: She stayed home because she felt sick.

zh: 他迟到了，所以没赶上公共汽车。
en: He was late, so he missed the bus.
She studies hard and gets good grades.
He wanted to go, but it was raining.

zh: 虽然她很累，但她继续工作。
en: Although she was tired, she kept working.

zh: 电影很无聊，但是音乐很棒。
en: The movie was boring. However, the music was great.

zh: 她每天练习，因此进步了。
en: She practiced every day. Therefore, she improved.

zh: 我认为我们应该互相帮助。
en: I think that we should help each other.
In my opinion, kindness matters most.
I agree with his suggestion.

zh: 我已经读过这本书三遍了。
en: I have read this book three times.
She has never tried rock climbing.

zh: 这是他第一次独自做饭。
en: This is the first time he has cooked alone.
How often do you go to the gym?
It is exciting to travel abroad.
There is no need to rush.
You had better see a doctor.

zh: 她没有看电视，而是看了一本书。
en: Instead of watching TV, she read a book.
He does love his job.
I wish I could speak French.
She said that she would be back soon.
Swimming is good for your health.

zh: 她让她的儿子打扫房间。
en: She told her son to clean his room.
The harder you work, the faster you improve.
